center.name: Charles Chubb (ornithologist)
center.summary: Charles Chubb (31 December 1851 – 25 June 1924) was a British ornithologist.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The campina thrush (Turdus arthuri) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Guyana, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: McConnell's spinetail (Synallaxis macconnelli) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Brazil, French Guiana, Guyana, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: nobilis Brodkorb, 1939 | range_map = Rhea americana Distribuzione.jpg | range_map_caption = Distribution of subspecies | synonyms = }} The greater rhea (Rhea americana) is a species of flightless bird native to eastern South America
